From: j.henderson@techsupplier.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: bob.morrison@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: RE: NGIS Phase 3 — Network Equipment Delivery Update
Date: Mon, 2 Mar 2026 09:14:32 -0500

Alice,

Following our call on Friday, I wanted to confirm in writing the situation
with the Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches for the NGIS Phase 3 data centre
migration.

Unfortunately, our primary distribution centre experienced a warehouse
management system failure that has affected ou

extracted_tasks.text: Let Jason Henderson know how TechSupplier can best support planning activities during this disruption
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Please let me know how we can best support your planning activities during this disruption.

extracted_tasks.text: Confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst switches; equipment needed on site no later than March 6 for staging and testing
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: can you please confirm the delivery timeline for the Catalyst switches? Our migration window opens March 8 and we need the equipment on site no later

extracted_tasks.text: Expedite the shipment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches to the Gatineau facility; revised estimated delivery date is March 20, 2026
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Our team is working around the clock to expedite the shipment. The revised estimated delivery date is March 20, 2026.

extracted_tasks.text: Assess impact of 2-week delivery delay on Q2 migration timeline and determine whether alternative routing via Vancouver depot is acceptable despite additional 3–5 business days
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: I understand this creates significant pressure on your Q2 migration timeline... alternative routing via our Vancouver depot would add a further 3–5 bu
